title: 8Pcs Deep Reach Markers Long Nib Nose Waterproof Marker Multi-Purpose Deep Hole Marker Pens Colorful Carpenter Ink Pen 45mm Reach Permanent Pens for Builder Construction Bathroom Decoration
features: 【Precision Marking】Our long nib marker is equipped with a 45mm long pen tip, fine point markers are designed for precise marking in hard-to-reach areas. Whether you are doing intricate woodworking or detailed art projects, these long nose markers ensure accuracy and fineness. Fine-tip permanent markers with extended pen tips enable you to easily mark deep holes and narrow spaces.

【High-quality Materials】These permanent markers are made of sturdy plastic material to make the shell, the carpenter pen is wear-resistant and tear-resistant, and the pen tip is thin and round. Our carpenter tools are very convenient to use.

【Wide Application】Our waterproof marker is designed to meet the diverse needs of professionals in multiple industries. Suitable for marking wood, metal, plastic, concrete, and more, the engineering pen offers the versatility to adapt to a variety of surfaces and materials. Whether you are in the construction, manufacturing, or crafting fields, these mark pens provide reliable performance for all your marking needs.

【Ergonomic Design】Designed with user comfort in mind, these construction markers have an ergonomic grip. Wood markers can reduce hand fatigue during long-term use, and deep hole marker enables professionals and DIY enthusiasts to work for long periods of time without discomfort.

【Colorful】This set of deep hole marker pens includes five dynamic colors: black, red, white, blue, and green. Each marking pen is equipped with waterproof, quick-drying ink that resists stains and fading, and the long tip marker ensures your markings stay vibrant and legible for a long time.
